multiple_choice.instruction: Write the letter of the correct definition

options.A: very quickly; at a fast speed
options.B: for one particular thing or purpose
options.C: finally, after everything else has been considered

items.definition: for one particular thing or purpose

true_false.instruction: True or False? Write T or F.

items.statement: This sentence has correct adverb placement: "She carefully placed the vase on the table."
items.explanation: Adverbs of manner ('carefully') go before the main verb ('placed').

items.statement: This sentence is correct: "They are always happy to help."
items.explanation: Adverbs of frequency ('always') come after the verb 'to be' ('are').

short_answer.instruction: Read the question. Write your answer (max 3 words or a number).
short_answer.question: Correct the adverb placement: "She drives carefully her car." (write the corrected sentence)
